import { OptionsProvider } from './components/Options';
import Input from './components/Form';
import Scene from './components/Scene';

<OptionsProvider>
  <Scene />
## Settings
  <Input />
</OptionsProvider>
### Description
#### Segments
Number of subdivisions in latitude-like and lontitude-like dimension.
#### Position
Latitude, lontitude and up-direction of the origin relative to the manifold.
#### Curvature
Parameter `kappa` indicating the curvature of such space, have the dimension of $$L^{-1}$$.
# Code explaination
```js file=./script/point.ts```
